title: Mob Duplicate
description: Mob will duplicate when you hit them!
body:
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gvfW2o5u/images/623c0eb75f013696790e6cb27bd267575558c90b.gif)

# MobDuplicate

Mob will duplicate when you hit them! 

# Getting Started

1. Install the plugin
2. Use `/mobduplicate` to enable duplication!

# Commands

- `/mobduplicate` - Toggle duplication
- `/mobduplicate status` - Show duplication status

# License

MIT License

# Note

- You need to manually enable duplication with command
- Projectile works too
- Tested paper version: 1.21.11
- Watched the video in credits, and seems fun to play with friends, so took a little bit of time coded this! Hope you enjoy :)
